name: Continuous Improvement
about: Suggest improvements for code quality, performance, or maintainability

labels: improvement
assignees: ''
---

## Improvement Category

- [ ] Code Quality
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Test Coverage
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Developer Experience
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Dependencies
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Other: _______

## Current State

Describe what currently exists and why it could be better.

## Proposed Improvement

What specific improvement do you propose?

## Expected Impact

What benefits would this improvement provide?

- Performance:
- Maintainability:
- User experience:
- Developer experience:
- Other:

## Implementation Approach

(Optional) How could this be implemented?

## Metrics

How can we measure the improvement?

- [ ] Test coverage increase
- [ ] Performance benchmarks
- [ ] Bundle size reduction
- [ ] Build time improvement
- [ ] Developer time saved
- [ ] Other: _______

## Priority

Your suggested priority:
- [ ] High (critical for project health)
- [ ] Medium (valuable but not urgent)
- [ ] Low (nice to have)

## Additional Context

Any relevant context, links, or examples.

---

**For AI-Assisted Development:**
This type of improvement is perfect for AI assistance. Consider using:
- `/improve-coverage` for test coverage improvements
- `/analyze-deps` for dependency optimization
- `/update-docs` for documentation improvements
